task_completion.description: Log into FreeMED using admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard is visible and indicates the current user is logged in as 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the user creation screen in FreeMED.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or page titled 'Add User', 'New User', or similar user administration interface is open in the FreeMED application.

task_completion.description: Enter the required username and name details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user creation form shows 'smitchell' in the Username field, 'Sarah' in the First Name field, 'Anne' in the Middle Name field, and 'Mitchell' in the Last Name field.

task_completion.description: Enter the required user type and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user creation form shows 'phy' (or the corresponding dropdown label like Physician/Provider) selected for User Type, and 'Nurse Practitioner' entered in the Description field.

task_completion.description: Enter the password and successfully save the new user account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The password field is filled (masked or unmasked, 13 characters for 'NP2024Secure!'), followed by a success message confirming account creation, or the new user 'smitchell' appearing in the FreeMED user list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeMED graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the FreeMED interface, rather than terminal windows using curl or API requests to create the user.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual FreeMED application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the standard FreeMED UI and URL, not a local text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no database management tools (like phpMyAdmin, MySQL CLI, or SQLite prompts) visible in the screenshots being used to insert the user record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create a user with the following exact details: Username: 'smitchell', First Name: 'Sarah', Middle Name: 'Anne', Last Name: 'Mitchell', User Type: 'phy', Description: 'Nurse Practitioner', Password: 'NP2024Secure!'. Note: The password field might be masked in screenshots, but look for evidence of the correct length (13 characters) or successful creation of the account with the other visible details.
